overview: Maverick Digitals is a premium multi-page agency website for a digital marketing firm. Features an immersive dark theme with neon gradients, advanced 3D interactions, glassmorphic design, and full backend storage for contact forms and blog content.
features: Premium dark-themed homepage with animated hero, 3D-tilt glassmorphic service cards, coverflow case studies carousel, orbit testimonials, animated process timeline, and FAQ accordion
Six supporting pages: Services, Industries, Case Studies, About (Muskan Rathod founder profile), Blog with search and filtering, and Contact
Sticky glassmorphic navbar with persistent CTA button, fully responsive
Scroll-based storytelling, parallax, micro-interactions, cursor glow effects, and cinematic transitions
Backend storage for contact form submissions and blog content
